_comment: Template for the MCP servers this skill uses. Copy the relevant entries into your agent's MCP config (Claude Code: .mcp.json at the project root, or `claude mcp add`), then fill in the redacted credentials. For sdk-docs, set X-User-Name to your Ludeo username (the local-part of your Ludeo email, e.g. jane.doe) — it identifies the caller. Both servers are optional — the skill falls back to the bundled references/ludeo-integration-docs/ when they are absent (see SKILL.md → MCP configuration). Ask the Ludeo integrations team for current URLs and credentials.

sdk-docs._purpose: Search the Ludeo SDK documentation — API reference, method signatures, parameter structs, callback chains (Unity/C# included). Primary source for SDK details at any phase. Fallback: bundled references/ludeo-integration-docs/.

ludeo-context._purpose: Ludeo company knowledge base — integration templates, QA workflows, event lists, repo context. Most useful for phase 1 (mapping) and phases 4-5 (tracking/restore and action discovery). Fallback: proceed without; analysis quality may be reduced.
